fields.summary: Build product recommendation system for e-commerce platform
fields.description:
## Summary
Implement a product recommendation system that suggests relevant products to users based on their browsing history, purchase behavior, and product similarity.

## Background
Our e-commerce platform currently shows products in a static order. We want to increase conversion and average order value by showing personalized product recommendations on the product detail page, cart page, and home page.

## Requirements

### 1. Recommendation Types
- **"Customers also bought"** — collaborative filtering based on co-purchase history.
- **"Similar products"** — content-based filtering using product attributes (category, brand, price range, tags).
- **"Recommended for you"** — personalized recommendations based on the logged-in user's history.
- **"Trending now"** — popularity-based fallback for new/anonymous users (cold start).

### 2. API
- Expose a REST endpoint: `GET /api/v1/recommendations`.
- Query params: `user_id` (optional), `product_id` (optional), `type` (one of: also_bought, similar, for_you, trending), `limit` (default 10, max 50).
- Response: JSON array of product objects with `product_id`, `score`, and `reason`.
- Endpoint must respond in under 200ms (p95).

### 3. Data Model
- Store user-product interaction events (view, add_to_cart, purchase) with timestamps.
- Maintain a product similarity matrix, refreshed on a schedule (e.g. nightly batch job).
- Support incremental updates as new interactions arrive.

### 4. Cold Start Handling
- New users with no history should receive trending/popular products.
- New products with no interactions should be recommended via content-based similarity.

### 5. Configuration
- Recommendation weights (collaborative vs content-based) must be configurable.
- Minimum score threshold to filter low-quality recommendations.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All four recommendation types return relevant results.
- [ ] API endpoint is documented (OpenAPI/Swagger).
- [ ] Cold start returns trending products for new users.
- [ ] Recommendations exclude out-of-stock and already-purchased items.
- [ ] Unit and integration tests cover each recommendation type with >80% coverage.
- [ ] p95 latency is under 200ms under load.
- [ ] Configurable weights are validated and documented.

## Technical Notes
- Follow existing repository coding standards and project structure.
- Reuse existing database connection/ORM layer.
- Add appropriate database indexes for interaction queries.
- Include a seed/fixture script with sample interaction data for local testing.

## Out of Scope
- Real-time streaming recommendations (batch refresh is acceptable for v1).
- A/B testing framework (tracked separately).
- Frontend UI implementation (this ticket covers the backend service and API only).
